---
title: 'Distortion Critique 4'
date: '2016-09-18T04:52:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '6557294544706903651'
blogger_filename: '/2016/09/distortion-critique-4_17.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'critique'
  - 'White Noise'
---

<br /><br />So I put out scene one from Distortion for a writer's critique. Here was the result:<br /><br /><br /><br />It's amazing how awesome this feedback was. You can live with your stuff long enough that you become blind to it. I have a lot of work to do (first novel) but I've studied the craft long enough to understand everything everyone is saying. Besides all the specific points, the two themes I noticed were a lack of emotional/physical reaction (nothing to keep you in Ash's head) and the Great Sin (show don't tell). I also changed tense and didn't notice (no that was not on purpose). There were many other great points, and I have a lot of work to do. Thanks again to&nbsp;<a href="http://www.scribophile.com/" target="_blank">http://www.scribophile.com/&nbsp;</a>for making a community for writers.<br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><div class="user" style="background-color: white; color: #222222; font-family: Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; position: relative; z-index: 10;"><br /><div style="font-weight: bold; text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;"><br /><a href="http://www.scribophile.com/authors/quinne-matts/" style="color: #c70c14; outline: 0px; text-decoration: none;">Quinne Matts</a></div><br /></div><br /><div class="bubble" style="background-color: white; border-radius: 8px; border: 2px solid rgb(221, 221, 221); color: #222222; font-family: Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; margin-left: 90px; position: relative;"><br /><div class="comment" style="padding: 10px;"><br /><h4 style="border-bottom: 2px solid rgb(238, 238, 238); color: #353e34; font-size: 16px; line-height: 22px; margin: 0px 0px 10px; padding-bottom: 5px;"><br />Opening Comments</h4><br /><div style="margin-top: 10px;"><br />Hi, Darell.</div><br /><div style="margin-top: 10px;"><br />I'll mention anything that jumps at me. &nbsp;I'm not good at rewriting sentences. Instead, I'll point out what I think needs work.</div><br /><div style="margin-top: 10px;"><br />See you inline.</div><br /><h4 style="border-bottom: 2px solid rgb(238, 238, 238); color: #353e34; font-size: 16px; line-height: 22px; margin: 40px 0px 10px; padding-bottom: 5px;"><br />Inline Critique</h4><br /><div class="inline-comment-body" id="inline-comment-651393"><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important;"><br /><ins style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #98e187; color: #111111; font-family: Verdana, sans-serif !important; font-size: 14px !important; line-height: 26px !important; padding: 0px 5px; text-decoration: none !important; white-space: pre-wrap;">I read a few paragraphs down and realised that the description of the setting doesn't flow. So, I'll point out those places I think need work.</ins>Out of the corner of his eye, through the window of The Grounded Cafe, Ash saw two men dressed in black combat gear duck behind a&nbsp;<mark style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #fff293; color: #111111; font-style: inherit !important; font-weight: inherit !important; line-height: 26px !important;">car</mark><br /><br /><ins style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #98e187; color: #111111; font-family: Verdana, sans-serif !important; font-size: 14px !important; line-height: 26px !important; padding: 0px 5px; text-decoration: none !important; white-space: pre-wrap;">Here, it'd be great to be specific with type of car. Is it a pick up? a 4x4?</ins>.</div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br />Coolness rushed down his spine, and his muscles tensed.</div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br />He reached for his sidearm.</div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><mark style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #fff293; color: #111111; font-style: inherit !important; font-weight: inherit !important; line-height: 26px !important;">He shook his head</mark><br /><br /><ins style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #98e187; color: #111111; font-family: Verdana, sans-serif !important; font-size: 14px !important; line-height: 26px !important; padding: 0px 5px; text-decoration: none !important; white-space: pre-wrap;">Is he shaking his head as a result of having a second thought?</ins>, and looked again, they were gone.<br /><br /><ins style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #98e187; color: #111111; font-family: Verdana, sans-serif !important; font-size: 14px !important; line-height: 26px !important; padding: 0px 5px; text-decoration: none !important; white-space: pre-wrap;">If yes, then you can rewrite this as: He shook his head upon a second thought. When he looked again, the men were gone.&nbsp;I decided to split the sentence into two because I thought the original one was choppy.</ins></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br />Ash relaxed and sank back into the leather bound chair<mark style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #fff293; color: #111111; font-style: inherit !important; font-weight: inherit !important; line-height: 26px !important;">;</mark><br /><br /><ins style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #98e187; color: #111111; font-family: Verdana, sans-serif !important; font-size: 14px !important; line-height: 26px !important; padding: 0px 5px; text-decoration: none !important; white-space: pre-wrap;">I'm not sure this is the correct punctuation mark for this sentence. I think...alone in the corner of his favourite coffee shop is a fragment. One way to do this is to bring it close to the Subject. E.g., Ash, alone in the corner of his favorite coffee shop, sank back into the leather bound chair. This is just one example of how to get rid of the semi-colon. Also, I deleted relaxed, as the action of leaning back into the chair, especially after he almost drew his gun, means he relaxed. This is just my opinion.</ins>&nbsp;alone, in the corner of his favorite coffee shop.</div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br />Always keep your back to the wall, be near the&nbsp;<mark style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #fff293; color: #111111; font-style: inherit !important; font-weight: inherit !important; line-height: 26px !important;">most exits</mark><br /><br /><ins style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #98e187; color: #111111; font-family: Verdana, sans-serif !important; font-size: 14px !important; line-height: 26px !important; padding: 0px 5px; text-decoration: none !important; white-space: pre-wrap;">do you mean the most used exits? If so, make it most used exists.</ins>, but never&nbsp;<mark style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #fff293; color: #111111; font-style: inherit !important; font-weight: inherit !important; line-height: 26px !important;">too visible</mark><br /><br /><ins style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #98e187; color: #111111; font-family: Verdana, sans-serif !important; font-size: 14px !important; line-height: 26px !important; padding: 0px 5px; text-decoration: none !important; white-space: pre-wrap;">once he seated in a cafe he would be visible. But something like he should glance at people suspiciously or he shouldn't be engaged in anything that would draw people's attention to him</ins>.&nbsp;<mark style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #fff293; color: #111111; font-style: inherit !important; font-weight: inherit !important; line-height: 26px !important;">It was like breathing, it never stopped... even in civilian life. Post-Traumatic Stress Disorder, PTSD.</mark><br /><br /><ins style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #98e187; color: #111111; font-family: Verdana, sans-serif !important; font-size: 14px !important; line-height: 26px !important; padding: 0px 5px; text-decoration: none !important; white-space: pre-wrap;">Here, swap the order of these two sentences. Bring the condition first, so that we know what the 'it' is referring to.</ins>That was the diagnosis they’d assigned him.</div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br />As Dean of Military Science, Ash's job primarily lay in administrative work and policy these days, plus a few sessions counseling the younger cadets<mark style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #fff293; color: #111111; font-style: inherit !important; font-weight: inherit !important; line-height: 26px !important;">,</mark><br /><br /><ins style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #98e187; color: #111111; font-family: Verdana, sans-serif !important; font-size: 14px !important; line-height: 26px !important; padding: 0px 5px; text-decoration: none !important; white-space: pre-wrap;">you don't need a comma here. You are only listing his roles.</ins>and would-be trouble makers. He was quite overqualified for the position, but he ran a tight unit.</div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><mark style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #fff293; color: #111111; font-style: inherit !important; font-weight: inherit !important; line-height: 26px !important;">He stared at the faces of the pedestrians as they passed by the window. Hurried. Busy.</mark><br /><br /><ins style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #98e187; color: #111111; font-family: Verdana, sans-serif !important; font-size: 14px !important; line-height: 26px !important; padding: 0px 5px; text-decoration: none !important; white-space: pre-wrap;">I know what you are trying to do here, but it doesn't flow. Make these three into one sentence. Besides, if the pedestrians are passing hurriedly, how long can he actually see someone's face. It'd be better to say that, He stared at pedestrians who hurried by, buried in their smart phones, oblivious to the world and the little clouds that floated around their shoulders.</ins>&nbsp;Buried in their smartphones. So oblivious to the world around them, or the little clouds that float around their shoulders.</div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><mark style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #fff293; color: #111111; font-style: inherit !important; font-weight: inherit !important; line-height: 26px !important;">The leaves began to fall, most turning shades of orange and yellow, matching perfectly the Pumpkins that were dotting porches and windows through the city the past few weeks.</mark><br /><br /><ins style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #98e187; color: #111111; font-family: Verdana, sans-serif !important; font-size: 14px !important; line-height: 26px !important; padding: 0px 5px; text-decoration: none !important; white-space: pre-wrap;">Here, you need to make reference to a particular tree. Which tree exactly is he looking at? Is it the one across the cafe? Beside the cafe? Do you get what I mean? Also, it'd be better to say that a leaf fell from the tree. It is easier to picture what is happening to the tree in question. Since it's a regional thing that at a particular time of the year the leaves change colour, once you mention the colour of the leaves, we would be able to picture the time of year. There would be no need to mention the pumpkin, unless the pumpkin is there to convey another message I'm not getting.</ins></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><mark style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #fff293; color: #111111; font-style: inherit !important; font-weight: inherit !important; line-height: 26px !important;">Some commotion outside broke his train of thought... Everyone was stopping, turning, and staring in the same direction, a few moving toward the distraction.</mark><br /><br /><ins style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #98e187; color: #111111; font-family: Verdana, sans-serif !important; font-size: 14px !important; line-height: 26px !important; padding: 0px 5px; text-decoration: none !important; white-space: pre-wrap;">Since from where he is sitting, he can't really see the commotion, you can't say that there was a commotion. These people could only be admiring a couple doing a crazy dance. So you can say that, suddenly every halted and looked in the same direction. The voice of people arguing reached him. (INSERT A THOUGHT HERE) Ash stepped outside to see what was happening.</ins></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br />Ash stepped outside to see what was happening,&nbsp;<mark style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #fff293; color: #111111; font-style: inherit !important; font-weight: inherit !important; line-height: 26px !important;">turned a corner, and&nbsp;</mark><br /><br /><del style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #ec6f6f; color: #111111; font-style: inherit !important; font-weight: inherit !important; line-height: 26px !important;">nearly ran into a bystander</del><mark style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #fff293; color: #111111; font-style: inherit !important; font-weight: inherit !important; line-height: 26px !important;">. A brisk evening breeze broke past his collar.</mark><br /><br /><ins style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #98e187; color: #111111; font-family: Verdana, sans-serif !important; font-size: 14px !important; line-height: 26px !important; padding: 0px 5px; text-decoration: none !important; white-space: pre-wrap;">If the thing is happening in the next alley, then people on the side of the road where Ash is looking would not see what's happening. I crossed out ...nearly ran into a... The question is, did he run into the bystander or not? If not, what exactly happened? To avoid these type of questions, it's better to say exactly what happened.</ins></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><mark style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #fff293; color: #111111; font-style: inherit !important; font-weight: inherit !important; line-height: 26px !important;">A man in a tattered and dirty suit with a graying beard was standing on top of a pickup truck screaming at nobody in particular.</mark><br /><br /><ins style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #98e187; color: #111111; font-family: Verdana, sans-serif !important; font-size: 14px !important; line-height: 26px !important; padding: 0px 5px; text-decoration: none !important; white-space: pre-wrap;">I'm finding it hard to picture what this mini scene is happening. Is this on the next street? It'd be great to show the exact location for the scene. Also, how were people gathered around them? Are they watching in clusters? Or they formed a circle around them?</ins></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br />"You always did love Mother best... I know... That's why... You couldn't keep your mouth shut..." On he went, incoherently.</div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br />Just as Ash took a step closer, the man turned to stare him directly in the eye.</div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br />In a deeper, gravelly voice: "You... What do you want with us?"</div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br />Ash took a step back.</div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br />Then the man turned back to his one-sided conversation.</div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br />Ash&nbsp;<mark style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #fff293; color: #111111; font-style: inherit !important; font-weight: inherit !important; line-height: 26px !important;">could see</mark><br /><br /><ins style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #98e187; color: #111111; font-family: Verdana, sans-serif !important; font-size: 14px !important; line-height: 26px !important; padding: 0px 5px; text-decoration: none !important; white-space: pre-wrap;">I don't know if you've heard this. But we're not allowed to use filter words in writer. Filter words indicate telling instead of showing. So, in this case, you can say that, Behind the man was a large, black figure with the head of a bull and the lower part only a mist. White streaks ran across it's torso, and it's eyes were red like a hot iron.</ins>&nbsp;a large creature behind the man. The bottom half was more mist than form, as though it were made of smoke.<br /><br /><ins style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #98e187; color: #111111; font-family: Verdana, sans-serif !important; font-size: 14px !important; line-height: 26px !important; padding: 0px 5px; text-decoration: none !important; white-space: pre-wrap;">Oh!</ins>&nbsp;The top half was like a man, with the head of a bull. It was charcoal,<br /><br /><del style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #ec6f6f; color: #111111; font-style: inherit !important; font-weight: inherit !important; line-height: 26px !important;">and</del><ins style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #98e187; color: #111111; font-family: Verdana, sans-serif !important; font-size: 14px !important; line-height: 26px !important; padding: 0px 5px; text-decoration: none !important; white-space: pre-wrap;">with</ins>&nbsp;streaks of white painted across the chest.</div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br />Ash<br /><br /><ins style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #98e187; color: #111111; font-family: Verdana, sans-serif !important; font-size: 14px !important; line-height: 26px !important; padding: 0px 5px; text-decoration: none !important; white-space: pre-wrap;">'s</ins><br /><br /><ins style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #98e187; color: #111111; font-family: Verdana, sans-serif !important; font-size: 14px !important; line-height: 26px !important; padding: 0px 5px; text-decoration: none !important; white-space: pre-wrap;">so, here were delete this</ins><del style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #ec6f6f; color: #111111; font-style: inherit !important; font-weight: inherit !important; line-height: 26px !important;">could feel his</del><br /><br /><ins style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #98e187; color: #111111; font-family: Verdana, sans-serif !important; font-size: 14px !important; line-height: 26px !important; padding: 0px 5px; text-decoration: none !important; white-space: pre-wrap;">because it's a filter word</ins>palms turn<br /><br /><ins style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #98e187; color: #111111; font-family: Verdana, sans-serif !important; font-size: 14px !important; line-height: 26px !important; padding: 0px 5px; text-decoration: none !important; white-space: pre-wrap;">ed</ins>&nbsp;cold, and<br /><br /><del style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #ec6f6f; color: #111111; font-style: inherit !important; font-weight: inherit !important; line-height: 26px !important;">he felt as though</del><br /><br /><ins style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #98e187; color: #111111; font-family: Verdana, sans-serif !important; font-size: 14px !important; line-height: 26px !important; padding: 0px 5px; text-decoration: none !important; white-space: pre-wrap;">filter words</ins>he couldn't move his legs.<br /><br /><ins style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #98e187; color: #111111; font-family: Verdana, sans-serif !important; font-size: 14px !important; line-height: 26px !important; padding: 0px 5px; text-decoration: none !important; white-space: pre-wrap;">You simply say, Ash halted, his palms turning cold.</ins></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><mark style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #fff293; color: #111111; font-style: inherit !important; font-weight: inherit !important; line-height: 26px !important;">A smaller creature was on the homeless man's shoulders, screaming into his ears.&nbsp;</mark><br /><br /><ins style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #98e187; color: #111111; font-family: Verdana, sans-serif !important; font-size: 14px !important; line-height: 26px !important; padding: 0px 5px; text-decoration: none !important; white-space: pre-wrap;">Wouldn't this be the first thing Ash would notice when he arrived at the scene?</ins>He couldn't hear the conversation, but Ash could tell that the homeless man was responding and that he had only been hearing one-half of the conversation.&nbsp;<mark style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #fff293; color: #111111; font-style: inherit !important; font-weight: inherit !important; line-height: 26px !important;">Ash looked around and nobody else seemed too surprised, as usual.</mark><br /><br /><ins style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #98e187; color: #111111; font-family: Verdana, sans-serif !important; font-size: 14px !important; line-height: 26px !important; padding: 0px 5px; text-decoration: none !important; white-space: pre-wrap;">It'd be better to show what they were doing instead.</ins></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br />The large creature stared directly at Ash, cocked his head to one side and disappeared along with the smaller one. The homeless man was by himself again, then his eyes narrowed. He leapt off the truck and ran at Ash.<br /><br /><ins style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #98e187; color: #111111; font-family: Verdana, sans-serif !important; font-size: 14px !important; line-height: 26px !important; padding: 0px 5px; text-decoration: none !important; white-space: pre-wrap;">Hahaha, trouble.</ins></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br />It took all his training to keep from being pinned down.<br /><br /><ins style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #98e187; color: #111111; font-family: Verdana, sans-serif !important; font-size: 14px !important; line-height: 26px !important; padding: 0px 5px; text-decoration: none !important; white-space: pre-wrap;">Okay, did he run for his life? Or he stood there, waiting for the man to pounce on him?</ins>T<mark style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #fff293; color: #111111; font-style: inherit !important; font-weight: inherit !important; line-height: 26px !important;">he old man was wiry but stronger than he looked.</mark><br /><br /><ins style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #98e187; color: #111111; font-family: Verdana, sans-serif !important; font-size: 14px !important; line-height: 26px !important; padding: 0px 5px; text-decoration: none !important; white-space: pre-wrap;">This is telling. Instead, have him struggle and to push the thing off him and let's him grunt in the attempt.</ins></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br />Ash let out a cry, "Jesus!"</div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><mark style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #fff293; color: #111111; font-style: inherit !important; font-weight: inherit !important; line-height: 26px !important;">The wiry man stepped back, his eyes darted around,</mark><br /><br /><ins style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #98e187; color: #111111; font-family: Verdana, sans-serif !important; font-size: 14px !important; line-height: 26px !important; padding: 0px 5px; text-decoration: none !important; white-space: pre-wrap;">The wiry man jerked and looked around, confused.</ins><br /><br /><del style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #ec6f6f; color: #111111; font-style: inherit !important; font-weight: inherit !important; line-height: 26px !important;">as though he looked confused.</del></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br />That was all Ash needed. In 30 seconds he hog-tied the man with his own belt.</div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><mark style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #fff293; color: #111111; font-style: inherit !important; font-weight: inherit !important; line-height: 26px !important;">The police were just arriving.&nbsp;</mark>"<br /><br /><ins style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #98e187; color: #111111; font-family: Verdana, sans-serif !important; font-size: 14px !important; line-height: 26px !important; padding: 0px 5px; text-decoration: none !important; white-space: pre-wrap;">Let's hear the siren.</ins>C<mark style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #fff293; color: #111111; font-style: inherit !important; font-weight: inherit !important; line-height: 26px !important;">harlie's at it again... Let's take him in."</mark><br /><br /><ins style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #98e187; color: #111111; font-family: Verdana, sans-serif !important; font-size: 14px !important; line-height: 26px !important; padding: 0px 5px; text-decoration: none !important; white-space: pre-wrap;">Let's have a dialogue tag here.</ins></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br />Three big men in uniform put cuffs and a muzzle on the old man, and threw him, rather harshly, into the back of the squad car.</div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br />Ash heard someone behind him, "Those were some moves, Marine."</div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><mark style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #fff293; color: #111111; font-style: inherit !important; font-weight: inherit !important; line-height: 26px !important;">"Airman. Uh... Thanks. No harm done." Ash noticed his cup crushed beneath him, the ice, coffee, and cream covered the sidewalk, and his jeans. "Well... Almost no harm anyway."</mark><br /><br /><ins style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #98e187; color: #111111; font-family: Verdana, sans-serif !important; font-size: 14px !important; line-height: 26px !important; padding: 0px 5px; text-decoration: none !important; white-space: pre-wrap;">I don't understand this. It read like he was carried a cup of coffee with him when he ran out of the cafe.</ins></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br />"Why don't you let me get you another… on me."<br /><br /><ins style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #98e187; color: #111111; font-family: Verdana, sans-serif !important; font-size: 14px !important; line-height: 26px !important; padding: 0px 5px; text-decoration: none !important; white-space: pre-wrap;">You need a dialogue tag here.</ins></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br />Ash looked up to see a balding man in blue slacks, yellow polo, and a pile of papers in his arms. A logo with two E’s overlapping bore prominently on his chest.</div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br />"The least I could do for a man who'd be willing to step into a situation like that, protect all these people. What's your name son?"<br /><br /><ins style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #98e187; color: #111111; font-family: Verdana, sans-serif !important; font-size: 14px !important; line-height: 26px !important; padding: 0px 5px; text-decoration: none !important; white-space: pre-wrap;">Same thing here. We need a dialogue tag.</ins></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br />"Ash. I need to get some new clothes. I don't think I need any more caffeine right now. But thanks for the offer." With a wave, he set off toward home.</div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br />Ash headed down the sidewalk, past the shops and restaurants.&nbsp;<mark style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #fff293; color: #111111; font-style: inherit !important; font-weight: inherit !important; line-height: 26px !important;">There is a girl crying, typing away on the phone. A little red frog on her shoulder was yelling into her ear. Ash could only imagine what it must be saying.</mark><br /><br /><ins style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #98e187; color: #111111; font-family: Verdana, sans-serif !important; font-size: 14px !important; line-height: 26px !important; padding: 0px 5px; text-decoration: none !important; white-space: pre-wrap;">You've switched to present tense. Why?</ins></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><mark style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #fff293; color: #111111; font-style: inherit !important; font-weight: inherit !important; line-height: 26px !important;">A little old lady is sitting inside a window at the nursing home. She is knitting something, probably a blanket. A large man in all white, stands behind her, smiling. He looks up at Ash, his smile fades slightly, and then returns. He looks down to her again.</mark></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /><br /><ins style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #98e187; color: #111111; font-family: Verdana, sans-serif !important; font-size: 14px !important; line-height: 26px !important; padding: 0px 5px; text-decoration: none !important; white-space: pre-wrap;">Let's see the distance between the phonebooth and the nursing home.</ins></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br />Ash could not see the figure accompanying each person, only certain ones, here and there. Most were just clouds or mist.</div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br />"Don't worry so much." His doctor told him, "These may be after effects of the war. We’re just beginning to understand PTSD. The mind is a marvelous adapter to stress. As long as these phantoms do not interrupt your daily work, or cause you to want to harm yourself or others, you should be fine. Consider yourself lucky. Just think of them as a construct of your active imagination, an amusing distraction from the mundane realities of life."<br /><br /><ins style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #98e187; color: #111111; font-family: Verdana, sans-serif !important; font-size: 14px !important; line-height: 26px !important; padding: 0px 5px; text-decoration: none !important; white-space: pre-wrap;">Here, add what Ash thinks about the Doctor's statement.</ins></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br />He turned off the street into an alley between two old buildings,<br /><br /><ins style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #98e187; color: #111111; font-family: Verdana, sans-serif !important; font-size: 14px !important; line-height: 26px !important; padding: 0px 5px; text-decoration: none !important; white-space: pre-wrap;">How tall are these buildings?</ins>&nbsp;and up a well-worn path into the woods, his refuge from the masses.</div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br />Ash opened the door of his cabin.</div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><mark style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #fff293; color: #111111; font-style: inherit !important; font-weight: inherit !important; line-height: 26px !important;">It wasn't a mansion by any means, but it was more than sufficient for him. 900 sq. ft., one large open room, a loft, and a balcony.</mark><br /><br /><ins style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #98e187; color: #111111; font-family: Verdana, sans-serif !important; font-size: 14px !important; line-height: 26px !important; padding: 0px 5px; text-decoration: none !important; white-space: pre-wrap;">This is telling. Instead, have him enter and describe how the space between the television and the bed is so small that, he can control the buttons on the TV with his toes without having to get up.</ins></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><mark style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #fff293; color: #111111; font-style: inherit !important; font-weight: inherit !important; line-height: 26px !important;">Yes sir, he owned one fine cabin in the woods. All to himself.&nbsp;</mark><br /><br /><ins style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #98e187; color: #111111; font-family: Verdana, sans-serif !important; font-size: 14px !important; line-height: 26px !important; padding: 0px 5px; text-decoration: none !important; white-space: pre-wrap;">I don't like this.</ins>How he'd managed to live here eight years and still not have a single friend invited over was a mystery, even to himself. Then again, you'd have to have a friend to invite one.</div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br />He liked things just so. He liked the solitude.<br /><br /><ins style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #98e187; color: #111111; font-family: Verdana, sans-serif !important; font-size: 14px !important; line-height: 26px !important; padding: 0px 5px; text-decoration: none !important; white-space: pre-wrap;">I like this.</ins></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br />At least that's what he told himself.</div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br />Ash took a seat on his balcony, overlooking the hills and lake. He stared at the expansive forests, lost in time. The&nbsp;<mark style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #fff293; color: #111111; font-style: inherit !important; font-weight: inherit !important; line-height: 26px !important;">clock read</mark><br /><br /><ins style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #98e187; color: #111111; font-family: Verdana, sans-serif !important; font-size: 14px !important; line-height: 26px !important; padding: 0px 5px; text-decoration: none !important; white-space: pre-wrap;">where's the clock?</ins>: 6:00pm, he laid down in his hammock, bundled in the overpriced winter resistant sleeping bag, and watched the stars from the balcony until he drifted off.</div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br />As sleep overtook him, he thought to himself "Yes sir, this is one fine cabin."</div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br />***</div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br />A<mark style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #fff293; color: #111111; font-style: inherit !important; font-weight: inherit !important; line-height: 26px !important;">n explosion knocks him against a wall. He barely sees, through the smoke, troops running about, hauling rubble off of bodies, checking pulses. Some are screaming in pain. Others shouting to one another. Half the mess hall is completely gone, all that is left is fire and rubble.</mark><br /><br /><ins style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #98e187; color: #111111; font-family: Verdana, sans-serif !important; font-size: 14px !important; line-height: 26px !important; padding: 0px 5px; text-decoration: none !important; white-space: pre-wrap;">You have switched tenses here. Are you doing it deliberately? If you are not aware, then I have just told you that you have switched to present tense.&nbsp;Also, it'd be interesting to describe this vividly. Which people are screaming in pain?</ins></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><mark style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #fff293; color: #111111; font-style: inherit !important; font-weight: inherit !important; line-height: 26px !important;">Ash can feel the beat of his heart in his neck</mark>,<br /><br /><ins style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #98e187; color: #111111; font-family: Verdana, sans-serif !important; font-size: 14px !important; line-height: 26px !important; padding: 0px 5px; text-decoration: none !important; white-space: pre-wrap;">if this is a metaphor, then ignore me. Otherwise I don't understand it.</ins>&nbsp;<mark style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #fff293; color: #111111; font-style: inherit !important; font-weight: inherit !important; line-height: 26px !important;">his forehead rushed with sweat</mark><br /><br /><ins style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #98e187; color: #111111; font-family: Verdana, sans-serif !important; font-size: 14px !important; line-height: 26px !important; padding: 0px 5px; text-decoration: none !important; white-space: pre-wrap;">Same thing here. If this is a regional thing, then leave as it is. But I really haven't heard anything like this before</ins>.&nbsp;<mark style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #fff293; color: #111111; font-style: inherit !important; font-weight: inherit !important; line-height: 26px !important;">He</mark><br /><br /><ins style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #98e187; color: #111111; font-family: Verdana, sans-serif !important; font-size: 14px !important; line-height: 26px !important; padding: 0px 5px; text-decoration: none !important; white-space: pre-wrap;">who is the 'he' referring to?</ins>sees them all running around, but all he hears is&nbsp;<mark style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #fff293; color: #111111; font-style: inherit !important; font-weight: inherit !important; line-height: 26px !important;">intense ringing</mark><br /><br /><ins style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #98e187; color: #111111; font-family: Verdana, sans-serif !important; font-size: 14px !important; line-height: 26px !important; padding: 0px 5px; text-decoration: none !important; white-space: pre-wrap;">ringing of what? Bells?</ins>.</div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br />As the&nbsp;<mark style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #fff293; color: #111111; font-style: inherit !important; font-weight: inherit !important; line-height: 26px !important;">numbness subsides</mark><br /><br /><ins style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #98e187; color: #111111; font-family: Verdana, sans-serif !important; font-size: 14px !important; line-height: 26px !important; padding: 0px 5px; text-decoration: none !important; white-space: pre-wrap;">I don't think I realised his brain was numb in the paragraph before this one.</ins>from his brain, shock waves<br /><br /><ins style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #98e187; color: #111111; font-family: Verdana, sans-serif !important; font-size: 14px !important; line-height: 26px !important; padding: 0px 5px; text-decoration: none !important; white-space: pre-wrap;">IMO, this should be waves of shock</ins>&nbsp;hit his chest as more buildings are getting hit nearby.</div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br />Ash uses the wall to steady himself and works to stand on his feet.</div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br />Others will tend to the wounded. This band of Jihadist miscreants found upgraded weapons; Russian no doubt.</div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br />Ash shoots out the building, down the road to the artillery unit. He grabs his rifle and heads for the highest structure, a radio tower toward the side of the camp.</div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br />He can see the launch area where the rockets are being fired from. He takes a few quick breaths, hyperventilating floods the lungs with oxygen, one last deep breath in and hold, steadies his body.</div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br />Through the scope, he can see about 10 of them.<br /><br /><ins style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #98e187; color: #111111; font-family: Verdana, sans-serif !important; font-size: 14px !important; line-height: 26px !important; padding: 0px 5px; text-decoration: none !important; white-space: pre-wrap;">10 of which people? Are they even people or aliens?</ins></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br />They only have two missile launchers. They have very little cover, firing from open desert, mostly hiding behind their Jeep and a few large outcroppings of fallen mountainside.</div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br />He fires two rounds back to back, taking out both missile launchers, one exploding in the handlers face. Ash then begins firing one round after another as the attackers fall like Coke cans on a fence post. The rounds hit their targets with extreme prejudice.</div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br />Three remain, cowering behind the Jeep. Jeeps are great vehicles for driving through tough terrain quickly, but they are built light, not armored. He sees one peek through the glass, gone.</div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br />The other two attempt to climb in the vehicle keeping their heads down and drive away. The problem with that is that both seats are occupied. He doesn't need to see them. Two. One.</div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br />The Jeep s<mark style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #fff293; color: #111111; font-style: inherit !important; font-weight: inherit !important; line-height: 26px !important;">peeds up as it drives erratically,</mark><br /><br /><ins style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #98e187; color: #111111; font-family: Verdana, sans-serif !important; font-size: 14px !important; line-height: 26px !important; padding: 0px 5px; text-decoration: none !important; white-space: pre-wrap;">You need only one.</ins>then crashes into a mound of rocks.</div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br />***</div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br />Ash woke up... another nightmare, if you can call a memory a nightmare.</div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br />He rubbed his eyes and glanced at his wrist.</div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br />Red numbers flooded his vision, 3:00 am.</div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Georgia, serif !important; font-size: 16px !important; line-height: 26px !important; margin-top: 10px;"><br />He rolled over and went back to sleep.<br /><br /><ins style="-webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; background-color: #98e187; color: #111111; font-family: Verdana, sans-serif !important; font-size: 14px !important; line-height: 26px !important; padding: 0px 5px; text-decoration: none !important; white-space: pre-wrap;">Nice way to end the scene. But then, where do we go from here? Why would I turn the page? That hasn't been added. So you need to end the chapter with a cliffhanger and what to expect next.</ins></div><br /></div><br /><h4 style="border-bottom: 2px solid rgb(238, 238, 238); color: #353e34; font-size: 16px; line-height: 22px; margin: 40px 0px 10px; padding-bottom: 5px;"><br />Closing Comments</h4><br /><div style="margin-top: 10px;"><br />I commented on most of the things that jumped at me. I focused on the narration, but not on the character. I hope something in this critique helps!</div><br /><div style="margin-top: 10px;"><br />It was an easy read for me.&nbsp;</div><br /><div style="margin-top: 10px;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin-top: 10px;"><br />Quinne.</div><br /></div><br /></div><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><blockquote class="tr_bq" style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: Verdana, Geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 15.4px; line-height: 19.6px;"><br /><div><br /><br /></div><br /></blockquote><br /><h4 style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: Verdana, Geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 15.4px; line-height: 19.6px; margin: 0px; position: relative;"><br />By&nbsp;<a href="https://plus.google.com/+DarrellWolfe/posts" style="color: #149adf; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Darrell Wolfe</a></h4><br /><blockquote class="tr_bq" style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: Verdana, Geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 15.4px; line-height: 19.6px;"><br /><i>Storyteller | Creative | <a href="http://www.16personalities.com/infj-personality" style="color: #149adf; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">INFJ</a>&nbsp;|&nbsp;<a href="https://www.gallupstrengthscenter.com/Purchase/en-US/Product?Path=Clifton%20StrengthsFinder" style="color: #149adf; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Intellection</a>&nbsp;|&nbsp;Ideation | Input | Learner | Achiever | Multipotentialite</i></blockquote><br /><ul><br /><li><i>See my full about page and disclosures: <a href="http://authorfun.blogspot.com/p/what-is-this.html" target="_blank">Click Here</a>.&nbsp;</i></li><br /><li><i>Also check out my <a href="http://authorfun.blogspot.com/p/affiliate-store.html" target="_blank">Resources and Suggestions </a>for writers (<a href="http://authorfun.blogspot.com/p/affiliate-store.html" target="_blank">here</a>).&nbsp;</i></li><br /><li><i>To Subscribe to the <a href="http://feeds.feedburner.com/AuthorFun" target="_blank">RSS: Click Here</a></i></li><br /><li><i>For Non-Fiction writing by <a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/" target="_blank">Darrell Wolfe: Click Here</a></i></li><br /></ul><br /><ul><br /></ul><br />
